data.title: Mill Creek Announces Groundbreaking of Modera Woodmont Beach
data.description: A diverse community in Des Moines, Washington is set to introduce 290 new homes and retail spaces. On April 6, 2026, Mill Creek Residential, a renowned developer, revealed plans for the innovative project. Specializing in upscale rental properties nationwide, the company aims to enhance the area with a mix of residential units and commercial establishments.

ISRAEL ATTACKED IRAN'S SOUTH PARS PETROCHEMICAL FACILITY IN ASSALUYEH -DEFENCE MINISTER KATZ

Reports from Iran: 'Mobin and Damavand companies, which supplied electricity, water, and oxygen to the Asaluyeh petrochemical complexes, have been targeted in an attack. Also, Pars Petrochemical is intact and has not been damaged.'

data.title: Oil prices fluctuate as President Trump issues threat to Iran over Strait of Hormuz closure, potentially escalating attacks.
data.description: On Sunday, President Trump issued a warning to Iranian leaders, stating that further attacks would occur if the Strait of Hormuz remained closed.

Israel Defense Minister Israel Katz: "The IDF is currently striking with force the largest petrochemical facility in Iran located in Esfahan. Now both facilities, which together are responsible for about 85% of Iran's petrochemical exports, have been put out of commission and are not operational."
IRAN'S IRGC DECLARES STRAIT OF HORMUZ WILL NOT GO BACK TO ITS FORMER CONDITION DUE TO REGIONAL CHANGES.
The Israeli Air Force struck Iran's "largest petrochemical facility" a short while ago, Defense Minister Israel Katz says.

data.title: In 2026, 5 AI desktop agents dominate, reshaping the $20/month productivity software market. Meet Manus, Claude Cowork, ChatGPT, Genspark, and Perplexity.
data.description: Five autonomous AI agents are currently controlling desktop computers. These agents, including Manus, Claude Cowork, ChatGPT, Genspark, and Perplexity, are vying for dominance in the $20 per month productivity market.

data.title: Savannah Guthrie back on 'Today' after 84-year-old mother (Nancy) went missing.
data.description: The anchor returned to the show on Monday after her 84-year-old mother, Nancy, went missing and has yet to be found.

data.title: Melville Family Foundation Welcomes Fern Johnson, Candace Uduebor, and Tony Caesar to Its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Dallas, the Melville Family Foundation (MFF), a nonprofit organization focused on promoting food security, academic success, and economic stability for families, revealed the selection of three top executives from the Texas business sector.

data.title: Grubhub Launches the First-Ever "Fee Return" Giving Back $100K in Grubhub Credit This Tax Season
data.description: Grubhub has recently announced a new initiative to enhance value for its customers. The company has decided to remove delivery fees and service fees for restaurant orders totaling $50 or more. Dubbed "Taxiety Relief," this program aims to provide more value to customers during peak times of stress. As part of this initiative, customers can expect a return that is not only beneficial but also delicious. This move comes as Grubhub continues to prioritize customer satisfaction and affordability.
